papers.title: Three Low-Dose Antihypertensive Agents in a Single Pill after Intracerebral Hemorrhage
papers.title_ja: 脳内出血後の再発性脳卒中予防における低用量3剤合剤の有効性と安全性
papers.journal: The New England Journal of Medicine
papers.authors: The Trident Research Group, Anderson CS, et al.
papers.abstract_en:
BACKGROUND: Blood-pressure reduction is the only proven treatment to prevent stroke due to intracerebral hemorrhage. Whether a single pill that combines three antihypertensive drugs at low doses, in addition to standard antihypertensive treatment, can lower blood pressure more than standard care alone and reduce the risk of recurrent stroke after intracerebral hemorrhage is uncertain.
METHODS: We conducted a multinational, double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial involving patients with a history of intracerebral hemorrhage. Patients were eligible for the trial if they had a systolic blood pressure of 130 to 160 mm Hg at baseline and were in clinically stable condition. After a 2-week active run-in phase during which all the patients received a once-daily pill containing three antihypertensive agents at low doses (telmisartan at 20 mg, amlodipine at 2.5 mg, and indapamide at 1.25 mg; the triple pill), the patients were randomly assigned to continue receiving the triple pill or to receive matching placebo. The primary outcome was the first recurrent stroke. Secondary outcomes included blood-pressure control, major cardiovascular events, death from cardiovascular causes, and safety.
RESULTS: Of 1670 patients who underwent randomization, 833 were assigned to receive the triple pill and 837 to receive placebo. The mean age of the patients was 58 years. At a median follow-up of 2.5 years, recurrent stroke had occurred in 38 patients (4.6%) in the triple-pill group and 62 (7.4%) in the placebo group (hazard ratio, 0.61; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.41 to 0.92; P=0.02). The mean systolic blood pressure during follow-up was 127 mm Hg and 138 mm Hg, respectively. The incidence of major cardiovascular events was lower with the triple pill than with placebo (6.6% vs. 9.8%; P=0.04). Serious adverse events occurred in 23.2% of the patients in the triple-pill group and 26.0% of those in the placebo group. Early discontinuation of the trial regimen due to an adverse event occurred in 13.6% and 6.0%, respectively. The most common adverse event leading to discontinuation was an increase of 20% or more in the serum creatinine level.
CONCLUSIONS: Among patients with intracerebral hemorrhage, treatment with a combination of three low-dose antihypertensive agents in a single pill, in addition to standard care, was associated with a lower incidence of recurrent stroke and major cardiovascular events than placebo.

abstract_sections.label: 背景
abstract_sections.content: 脳内出血による脳卒中を予防する唯一の証明された治療法は血圧低下である。標準的な降圧治療に加えて、低用量の3つの降圧薬を組み合わせた単一の錠剤（シングルピル）が、標準治療単独と比較して血圧をより下げ、脳内出血後の再発性脳卒中のリスクを軽減できるかどうかは不確実である。
abstract_sections.content_en: Blood-pressure reduction is the only proven treatment to prevent stroke due to intracerebral hemorrhage. Whether a single pill that combines three antihypertensive drugs at low doses, in addition to standard antihypertensive treatment, can lower blood pressure more than standard care alone and reduce the risk of recurrent stroke after intracerebral hemorrhage is uncertain.

abstract_sections.label: 方法
abstract_sections.content: 脳内出血の既往がある患者を対象とした国際的な二重盲検ランダム化プラセボ対照試験を実施した。ベースラインの収縮期血圧が130〜160 mm Hgで臨床的に安定している患者を適格とした。2週間のアクティブ・ランイン期間（テルミサルタン20mg、アムロジピン2.5mg、インダパミド1.25mgを含むトリプルピルを全患者が服用）の後、患者をトリプルピル継続群とプラセボ群にランダムに割り付けた。主要アウトカムは初回の再発性脳卒中とし、副次アウトカムには血圧管理、主要心血管イベント、心血管死、安全性が含まれた。
abstract_sections.content_en: We conducted a multinational, double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial involving patients with a history of intracerebral hemorrhage. Patients were eligible for the trial if they had a systolic blood pressure of 130 to 160 mm Hg at baseline and were in clinically stable condition. After a 2-week active run-in phase during which all the patients received a once-daily pill containing three antihypertensive agents at low doses (telmisartan at 20 mg, amlodipine at 2.5 mg, and indapamide at 1.25 mg; the triple pill), the patients were randomly assigned to continue receiving the triple pill or to receive matching placebo. The primary outcome was the first recurrent stroke. Secondary outcomes included blood-pressure control, major cardiovascular events, death from cardiovascular causes, and safety.

abstract_sections.label: 結果
abstract_sections.content: 1670例をランダム化し、トリプルピル群833例、プラセボ群837例とした。追跡期間中央値2.5年で、再発性脳卒中はトリプルピル群38例（4.6%）、プラセボ群62例（7.4%）に発生した（ハザード比0.61、95%信頼区間0.41〜0.92、P=0.02）。追跡期間中の平均収縮期血圧はそれぞれ127 mm Hg、138 mm Hgであった。主要心血管イベントの発生率はトリプルピル群がプラセボ群より低かった（6.6% vs 9.8%、P=0.04）。重篤な有害事象の発生率は両群で同程度であったが、有害事象による早期中止はトリプルピル群で13.6%、プラセボ群で6.0%であった。
abstract_sections.content_en: Of 1670 patients who underwent randomization, 833 were assigned to receive the triple pill and 837 to receive placebo. The mean age of the patients was 58 years. At a median follow-up of 2.5 years, recurrent stroke had occurred in 38 patients (4.6%) in the triple-pill group and 62 (7.4%) in the placebo group (hazard ratio, 0.61; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.41 to 0.92; P=0.02). The mean systolic blood pressure during follow-up was 127 mm Hg and 138 mm Hg, respectively. The incidence of major cardiovascular events was lower with the triple pill than with placebo (6.6% vs. 9.8%; P=0.04). Serious adverse events occurred in 23.2% of the patients in the triple-pill group and 26.0% of those in the placebo group. Early discontinuation of the trial regimen due to an adverse event occurred in 13.6% and 6.0%, respectively.

abstract_sections.label: 結論
abstract_sections.content: 脳内出血後の患者において、標準治療に加えて低用量3剤配合錠を用いる治療は、プラセボと比較して再発性脳卒中および主要心血管イベントの発生率の低下と関連していた。
abstract_sections.content_en: Among patients with intracerebral hemorrhage, treatment with a combination of three low-dose antihypertensive agents in a single pill, in addition to standard care, was associated with a lower incidence of recurrent stroke and major cardiovascular events than placebo.

pico.P: 脳内出血の既往があり、ベースラインの収縮期血圧が130〜160 mm Hgで臨床的に安定している成人患者
pico.I: 低用量3剤合剤（テルミサルタン20mg、アムロジピン2.5mg、インダパミド1.25mg）を1日1回投与
pico.C: マッチングプラセボ投与

papers.title: Routine vs Selective Calcium Supplementation After Total Thyroidectomy: A Randomized Clinical Trial
papers.title_ja: 甲状腺全摘術後のカルシウム補充において、PTH値を指標とした選択的投与はルーチン投与と比較して非劣性ではない
papers.authors: Garcia-Lozano C, Betancourt C, Sanchez JG, et al.
papers.abstract_en:
IMPORTANCE Postoperative hypocalcemia is the most frequent complication after total thyroidectomy. Prophylactic supplementation with calcium and calcitriol (C+C) is widely used, but selective administration based on early postoperative parathyroid hormone (PTH) levels may reduce overtreatment.
OBJECTIVE To compare the incidence of symptomatic and biochemical hypocalcemia with routine prophylactic C+C and selective supplementation guided by postoperative PTH levels.
DESIGN, SETTINGS, AND PARTICIPANTS This was a multicenter, pragmatic, randomized clinical trial conducted from June 1, 2022, to July 31, 2024, at 3 tertiary hospitals with adult patients undergoing total thyroidectomy for benign or malignant disease.
INTERVENTIONS Selective supplementation when 4-hour postoperative PTH level was less than 15 pg/mL (PTH group) or routine prophylactic C+C for 15 days (C+C group).
RESULTS The analysis included a total of 258 participants; the PTH group comprised 117 patients and the C+C group, 141 patients. Symptomatic hypocalcemia occurred in 24 patients overall (9.3%), 11 (7.8%) in PTH group and 13 (11.1%) in C+C group (odds ratio [OR], 0.68; 95% CI, 0.29-1.57; P = .36). In the subgroup with complete biochemical data, biochemical hypocalcemia was observed in 29 of 148 participants (16 in PTH [21.6%] and 13 in C+C [17.6%]) (OR, 1.29; 95% CI, 0.57-2.93; P = .53). The PTH group needed less calcium supplementation.
CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE This randomized clinical trial found that selective calcium supplementation based on postoperative PTH values was not superior to routine calcium supplementation for preventing symptomatic or biochemical hypocalcemia after total thyroidectomy. Either strategy may be used, with choice depending on resource availability and clinical setting.

abstract_sections.label: 背景
abstract_sections.content: 術後低カルシウム血症は甲状腺全摘術後の最も頻度の高い合併症である。カルシウムおよびカルシトリオール（C+C）の予防的投与が広く行われているが、術後早期の副甲状腺ホルモン（PTH）値を指標とした選択的投与により過剰治療を減らせる可能性がある。
abstract_sections.content_en: Postoperative hypocalcemia is the most frequent complication after total thyroidectomy. Prophylactic supplementation with calcium and calcitriol (C+C) is widely used, but selective administration based on early postoperative parathyroid hormone (PTH) levels may reduce overtreatment.

abstract_sections.label: 方法
abstract_sections.content: 良性または悪性疾患のため甲状腺全摘術を受ける成人患者を対象とした多施設共同実用的無作為化比較試験。介入群（PTH群）は術後4時間のPTH値が15pg/mL未満の場合にのみカルシウム補充を行い、対照群（C+C群）は15日間のルーチン予防投与を行った。
abstract_sections.content_en: This was a multicenter, pragmatic, randomized clinical trial conducted from June 1, 2022, to July 31, 2024, at 3 tertiary hospitals with adult patients undergoing total thyroidectomy for benign or malignant disease. Selective supplementation when 4-hour postoperative PTH level was less than 15 pg/mL (PTH group) or routine prophylactic C+C for 15 days (C+C group).

abstract_sections.label: 結果
abstract_sections.content: 258例を解析した。術後15日時点の症候性低カルシウム血症は、PTH群で11例（7.8%）、C+C群で13例（11.1%）であり、有意差は認められなかった（OR 0.68, 95% CI 0.29-1.57, P = .36）。生化学的低カルシウム血症の発生率にも有意差はなかった。PTH群は補充の必要性が少なかった。
abstract_sections.content_en: The analysis included a total of 258 participants; the PTH group comprised 117 patients and the C+C group, 141 patients. Symptomatic hypocalcemia occurred in 24 patients overall (9.3%), 11 (7.8%) in PTH group and 13 (11.1%) in C+C group (odds ratio [OR], 0.68; 95% CI, 0.29-1.57; P = .36). In the subgroup with complete biochemical data, biochemical hypocalcemia was observed in 29 of 148 participants (16 in PTH [21.6%] and 13 in C+C [17.6%]) (OR, 1.29; 95% CI, 0.57-2.93; P = .53). The PTH group needed less calcium supplementation.

abstract_sections.label: 結論
abstract_sections.content: PTH値を指標とした選択的カルシウム補充は、ルーチン補充と比較して術後低カルシウム血症の予防において優越性を示さなかった。いずれの戦略も使用可能であり、医療資源や臨床現場の状況に応じて選択すべきである。
abstract_sections.content_en: This randomized clinical trial found that selective calcium supplementation based on postoperative PTH values was not superior to routine calcium supplementation for preventing symptomatic or biochemical hypocalcemia after total thyroidectomy. Either strategy may be used, with choice depending on resource availability and clinical setting.

pico.P: 甲状腺全摘術を受ける成人患者
pico.I: 術後PTH値に基づく選択的カルシウム・カルシトリオール補充
pico.C: ルーチンでのカルシウム・カルシトリオール予防投与
pico.O: 術後15日時点の症候性低カルシウム血症発生率（PTH群 7.8% vs C+C群 11.1%, OR 0.68, 95% CI 0.29-1.57, P = .36）

papers.title: Glycaemic control and pregnancy outcomes with real-time continuous glucose monitoring in gestational diabetes (GRACE): an open-label, multicentre, multinational, randomised controlled trial
papers.title_ja: 妊娠糖尿病の女性においてリアルタイム持続血糖測定（rt-CGM）は、自己血糖測定（SMBG）と比較して巨大児（LGA）の割合を有意に減少させる
papers.authors: Linder T, Dressler-Steinbach I, Wegener S, Schellong K, Schmidt S, Eppel D, Monod C, Heinzl F, Redling K, Winzeler B, Mosimann B, Weschenfelder F, Groten T, Mittlböck M, Jendle J, Henrich W, Morettini M, Bozkurt L, Tura A, Göbl C, et al.
papers.abstract_en:
Background: Data regarding the impact of real-time continuous glucose monitoring (rt-CGM) on reducing adverse pregnancy outcomes in women with gestational diabetes are contradictory. We aimed to assess differences in the proportion of large-for-gestational-age (LGA) newborns between women using rt-CGM versus self-monitoring of blood glucose (SMBG).
Methods: For this open-label, parallel-group, multicentre, randomised controlled trial, women aged 18–55 years with singleton pregnancy and gestational diabetes (diagnosed according to the International Association of the Diabetes and Pregnancy Study Groups criteria), were randomly assigned (1:1) to rt-CGM or SMBG. The first allocation was by chance; for subsequent allocations, minimisation was used to balance three prespecified factors: gestational age at study entry, previous gestational diabetes, and preconceptional BMI. SMBG participants used blinded CGM for 10 days after randomisation and at 36–38 weeks; rt-CGM participants used open rt-CGM until delivery. All were managed according to standard care protocols in four university hospitals in Austria, Germany, and Switzerland. The primary endpoint was the proportion of LGA newborns (using the Perinatal Institute’s GROW customised birthweight percentiles), assessed in the intention-to-treat population. Secondary endpoints included the requirement for glucose lowering medication, CGM metrics, and non-glycaemic maternal and neonatal outcomes. Recruitment and follow-up are complete. This study is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT03981328).
Findings: Between Aug 24, 2020, and May 30, 2024, 610 women were screened for eligibility, of whom 375 (diagnosed with gestational diabetes at a mean of 25·2weeks [SD 2·3] of gestation), were randomly assigned to rt-CGM (n=190) or SMBG (n=185) at a mean of 28·6 weeks (SD 1·9) of gestation. 170 intervention and 175 control participants with available data were assessed for the primary endpoint. LGA neonates were born to six (4%) of 170 rt-CGM and 18 (10%) of 175 SMBG participants (OR 0·32, 95% CI 0·10–0·87, p=0·014). Small-for-gestational-age (SGA) neonates were born to 33 (19%) and 23 (13%) participants, respectively (OR 1·59, 0·86–2·99, p=0·11). Serious adverse events occurred in 23 (12%) of 190 versus 28 (15%) of 185 participants (OR 0·77, 0·42–1·40, p=0·39).
Interpretation: rt-CGM use in women with gestational diabetes reduced LGA births, without differences in serious adverse events. The higher-than-expected overall prevalence of SGA infants, possibly related to the tight glycaemic control in our cohort, requires further research.

abstract_sections.label: 背景
abstract_sections.content: 妊娠糖尿病の女性において、リアルタイム持続血糖測定（rt-CGM）が妊娠悪影響の減少に及ぼす影響に関するデータは矛盾している。我々は、rt-CGMを使用する女性と自己血糖測定（SMBG）を使用する女性との間で、妊娠週数に比して大きい（LGA）新生児の割合の差を評価することを目的とした。
abstract_sections.content_en: Data regarding the impact of real-time continuous glucose monitoring (rt-CGM) on reducing adverse pregnancy outcomes in women with gestational diabetes are contradictory. We aimed to assess differences in the proportion of large-for-gestational-age (LGA) newborns between women using rt-CGM versus self-monitoring of blood glucose (SMBG).

abstract_sections.label: 方法
abstract_sections.content: このオープンラベル、並行群間、多施設、ランダム化比較試験では、単胎妊娠で妊娠糖尿病（国際糖尿病・妊娠研究グループ連合の基準に従って診断）の18〜55歳の女性を、rt-CGM群またはSMBG群に（1:1）の割合でランダムに割り付けた。最初の割り付けは確率的に行われ、それ以降の割り付けでは、試験登録時の妊娠週数、過去の妊娠糖尿病の有無、受胎前BMIの3つの事前規定因子をバランスさせるために最小化法が用いられた。SMBG群の参加者は、ランダム化後10日間および妊娠36〜38週目に盲検化CGMを使用し、rt-CGM群の参加者は分娩まで非盲検rt-CGMを使用した。全員がオーストリア、ドイツ、スイスの4つの大学病院における標準治療プロトコルに従って管理された。主要エンドポイントは、意図治療（ITT）集団において評価された、Perinatal InstituteのGROWカスタマイズ出生体重パーセンタイルを用いたLGA新生児の割合であった。副次エンドポイントには、血糖降下薬の必要性、CGM指標、および非血糖に関連する母体および新生児のアウトカムが含まれた。リクルートおよびフォローアップは完了している。本試験はClinicalTrials.gov（NCT03981328）に登録されている。
abstract_sections.content_en: For this open-label, parallel-group, multicentre, randomised controlled trial, women aged 18–55 years with singleton pregnancy and gestational diabetes (diagnosed according to the International Association of the Diabetes and Pregnancy Study Groups criteria), were randomly assigned (1:1) to rt-CGM or SMBG. The first allocation was by chance; for subsequent allocations, minimisation was used to balance three prespecified factors: gestational age at study entry, previous gestational diabetes, and preconceptional BMI. SMBG participants used blinded CGM for 10 days after randomisation and at 36–38 weeks; rt-CGM participants used open rt-CGM until delivery. All were managed according to standard care protocols in four university hospitals in Austria, Germany, and Switzerland. The primary endpoint was the proportion of LGA newborns (using the Perinatal Institute’s GROW customised birthweight percentiles), assessed in the intention-to-treat population. Secondary endpoints included the requirement for glucose lowering medication, CGM metrics, and non-glycaemic maternal and neonatal outcomes. Recruitment and follow-up are complete. This study is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT03981328).

abstract_sections.label: 結果
abstract_sections.content: 2020年8月24日から2024年5月30日の間に、610人の女性が適格性をスクリーニングされ、そのうち妊娠糖尿病と診断された375人（平均妊娠週数25.2週［SD 2.3］）が、平均妊娠週数28.6週（SD 1.9）でrt-CGM群（n=190）またはSMBG群（n=185）にランダムに割り付けられた。データが利用可能であった介入群170人と対照群175人が主要エンドポイントについて評価された。LGA新生児は、rt-CGM群の170人中6人（4%）およびSMBG群の175人中18人（10%）に生まれた（OR 0.32, 95% CI 0.10–0.87, p=0.014）。妊娠週数に比して小さい（SGA）新生児は、それぞれ33人（19%）および23人（13%）に生まれた（OR 1.59, 0.86–2.99, p=0.11）。重篤な有害事象は、190人中23人（12%）対185人中28人（15%）で発生した（OR 0.77, 0.42–1.40, p=0.39）。
abstract_sections.content_en: Between Aug 24, 2020, and May 30, 2024, 610 women were screened for eligibility, of whom 375 (diagnosed with gestational diabetes at a mean of 25·2weeks [SD 2·3] of gestation), were randomly assigned to rt-CGM (n=190) or SMBG (n=185) at a mean of 28·6 weeks (SD 1·9) of gestation. 170 intervention and 175 control participants with available data were assessed for the primary endpoint. LGA neonates were born to six (4%) of 170 rt-CGM and 18 (10%) of 175 SMBG participants (OR 0·32, 95% CI 0·10–0·87, p=0·014). Small-for-gestational-age (SGA) neonates were born to 33 (19%) and 23 (13%) participants, respectively (OR 1·59, 0·86–2·99, p=0·11). Serious adverse events occurred in 23 (12%) of 190 versus 28 (15%) of 185 participants (OR 0·77, 0·42–1·40, p=0·39).

abstract_sections.label: 結論
abstract_sections.content: 妊娠糖尿病女性におけるrt-CGMの使用は、重篤な有害事象に差を認めることなく、LGA児の誕生を減少させた。SGA児の全体的な有病率が予想以上に高かったことは、本コホートにおける厳格な血糖管理に関連している可能性があり、さらなる研究が必要である。
abstract_sections.content_en: rt-CGM use in women with gestational diabetes reduced LGA births, without differences in serious adverse events. The higher-than-expected overall prevalence of SGA infants, possibly related to the tight glycaemic control in our cohort, requires further research.

pico.P: 妊娠糖尿病と診断された18〜55歳の単胎妊娠の女性（375人、ランダム化時の平均妊娠週数28.6週）
pico.I: 分娩までリアルタイム持続血糖測定（rt-CGM、Dexcom G6 Pro）を継続的に使用する血糖管理管理
pico.C: 自己血糖測定（SMBG、1日4回測定）による標準的な治療管理
pico.O: 主要アウトカム：妊娠週数に比して大きい（LGA）新生児の割合。rt-CGM群で4%（6/170人）対 SMBG群で10%（18/175人）であり、rt-CGMの使用によりLGA新生児の割合が有意に減少した（OR 0.32, 95% CI 0.10–0.87, p=0.014）。
